// 1. Add a single reference column with a foreign key constraint
// Creates a `userId` integer column and a foreign key pointing to the `users` table.
t = createTable(name='posts');
	t.string(columnNames='title', limit=255, allowNull=false);
	t.references(referenceNames='user');
	t.timestamps();
t.create();

// 2. Add multiple reference columns at once
// Creates `authorId` and `categoryId` integer columns, each with a foreign key.
t = createTable(name='articles');
	t.string(columnNames='title', limit=255, allowNull=false);
	t.references(referenceNames='author,category');
	t.timestamps();
t.create();

// 3. Add a polymorphic reference (no foreign key, adds a `<name>type` string column)
// Creates `commentableId` (integer) and `commentableType` (string) columns.
t = createTable(name='comments');
	t.text(columnNames='body', allowNull=false);
	t.references(referenceNames='commentable', polymorphic=true);
	t.timestamps();
t.create();

// 4. Add a reference with cascade delete and allow null
t = createTable(name='attachments');
	t.references(referenceNames='post', allowNull=true, onDelete='cascade');
	t.string(columnNames='fileName', limit=255);
	t.timestamps();
t.create();
